title: Held Item Saver [Cobblemon]
description: This sidemod stores the Held Item state of all Pokemon at the beginning of a battle, and then restores any items that are missing/different from the initial state back to their origin.
body:
Stops Held Items from being lost after being Removed/Consumed in Battle

This sidemod stores the Held Item state of all Pokemon at the beginning of a battle, and then restores any items that are missing/different from the initial state back to their original state.

The only config option is in HeldItemSaver.json {"logsEnabled":<true/false>} If logsEnabled = true, every single battle (Wild and PvP) will display the Players' Party-held item states in the Console. If set to false, no logs will be output to Console.

The only command is /helditemsaver reload which will reflect the changes made in HeldItemSaver.json
